description: Integrate a provider-agnostic Vercel AI SDK assistant with secure RPC-only read access, tenant-safe behavior, and repair-request draft generation (no direct writes, no attachments).

userStories.title: Create secure /api/chat route with session guard
userStories.description: As a system administrator, I want chat requests authenticated server-side so that unauthenticated users cannot invoke models or tools.
acceptanceCriteria: Add /api/chat route handler in App Router
Route validates NextAuth session before processing requests
Unauthenticated requests return 401 or 403 and skip model/tool execution
Request payload is schema-validated and malformed payloads are rejected
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add provider-agnostic AI SDK configuration
userStories.description: As a platform maintainer, I want provider selection abstracted behind config so that model providers can change without rewriting product logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Model provider is selected through configuration or environment variables
Chat route uses Vercel AI SDK abstractions instead of provider-specific UI coupling
No provider-specific requirement is hard-coded into user-facing behavior
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement RPC-only tool execution guardrails
userStories.description: As a security owner, I want AI tools restricted to approved RPC pathways so that tenant isolation and data boundaries are preserved.
acceptanceCriteria: Define explicit allowlist mapping for AI callable tools
Tool execution path does not use direct Supabase table reads via supabase.from(...)
Tool execution routes through approved RPC functions only
Arbitrary RPC/function invocation is blocked
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Enforce tenant-aware context rules in chat backend
userStories.description: As a multi-tenant user, I want assistant responses constrained to my authorized tenant scope so that AI output matches permitted data boundaries.
acceptanceCriteria: Chat backend accepts tenant context metadata from client request
Role-aware tenant enforcement mirrors existing app security behavior
Privileged users missing required facility selection receive guidance instead of broad data reads
Non-privileged users cannot override tenant boundaries through request metadata
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add global assistant panel in protected layout
userStories.description: As an authenticated user, I want a global assistant panel in the protected app shell so that I can open AI help from any protected page.
acceptanceCriteria: Render chat trigger and panel from protected layout layer
Assistant panel is available across protected routes
Assistant panel is hidden for unauthenticated sessions
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Implement v1 chat interaction constraints
userStories.description: As a user, I want stable chat interaction states so that I can safely use the assistant without unsupported features.
acceptanceCriteria: Chat input and submit controls are disabled while status is not ready
No file or image attachment controls are rendered in v1 UI
Streaming assistant responses are rendered in the panel
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add equipment read-only retrieval tool
userStories.description: As a technician, I want AI to retrieve equipment details through approved tools so that I can answer operational questions quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement equipment read-only tool with explicit schema and description
Tool returns equipment lookup or summary data through RPC-only execution
Tool output is included in assistant response flow
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add maintenance and repair summary read-only tools
userStories.description: As an equipment manager, I want AI to summarize maintenance and repair status through read-only tools so that I can triage work faster.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement maintenance summary read-only tool with explicit schema
Implement repair summary read-only tool with explicit schema
Both tools execute through approved RPC pathways only
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Generate structured repair-request drafts without submission
userStories.description: As a user creating repair requests, I want AI to generate a structured draft so that I can prefill forms while keeping final submission manual.
acceptanceCriteria: Assistant can generate a structured repair-request draft payload from natural language
Draft output is validated against a defined schema
Draft flow does not call create, update, or delete RPC operations
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement safe error handling and fallback guidance
userStories.description: As an operator, I want predictable and safe failure behavior so that users receive clear guidance without sensitive data leakage.
acceptanceCriteria: API error responses avoid exposing secrets and internal infrastructure details
Chat UI displays retryable failure state for request errors
Missing tenant-selection scenarios show explicit Vietnamese guidance message
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
